headline: Cramer Calls Red-Hot Drone Stock a “Meme Stock” That Could “Rip Your Lungs Out”
summary: During the Lightning Round of CNBC’s Mad Money, Jim Cramer adopted a more defensive stance, characterizing the broader market as “turned ugly.” One of his strongest warnings was reserved for Ondas Holdings (NASDAQ:ONDS), one of 2026’s hottest drone and counter-drone stocks. headline: Wall Street Analysts See a 26.04% Upside in Carnival (CCL): Can the Stock Really Move This High?
